info.title: Qualification Web Services
info.description: Web Services for managing the Qualifications.

post.summary: Gets the type of the Qualifications associated with objects/Items passed in payload as Target Items.

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

oneOf.title: Based on target items in the payload, qualifications data will be returned.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: input Qualification type to be retrieved. Example- generalQualification or equivalentQualification

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description:
Specify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request. Provide combination of comma separated entries including keywords none & all plus payload specific sub-resources:

[!]target, [!]contexts, [!]prerequisite, [!]documents, [!]proof, [!]ownerInfo, [!]context-restrictions

Some entries are enabled by default which are described in the schema section of the response payload. For more information about refinement, see 6W REST Services Principles - Refinement Section.

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

oneOf.title: Modified qualification data will be returned.

parameters.description:

patch.summary: For the given qualification, this API update its connected target,context and context restrictions to latest revision based on the query param setting passed

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

oneOf.title: Based on query parameter passed, qualifications data will be returned.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: If true, the qualification will be connected with all the latest revision of the target in the same revision branch

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: If true, the qualification will be connected with all the latest revision of the context in the same revision branch

parameters.name: contextrestriction
parameters.description: If true, the qualification will be connected with all the latest revision of the context restrictions in the same revision branch. It is not application for the Context Qualification

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description:
Specify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request. Provide combination of comma separated entries including keywords none & all plus payload specific sub-resources:

[!]target, [!]contexts, [!]prerequisite, [!]documents, [!]proof, [!]ownerInfo, [!]context-restrictions

Some entries are enabled by default which are described in the schema section of the response payload. For more information about refinement, see 6W REST Services Principles - Refinement Section.

get.summary: Search Qualifications for the provided input string.

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

parameters.name: searchStr
parameters.description: Search Criteria; 2 or more characters required.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of objects to return; default 50; max 1000

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of objects to skip in case of paginating through the serach results; default 0

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description:
Specify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request. Provide combination of comma separated entries including keywords none & all plus payload specific sub-resources:

[!]target, [!]contexts, [!]prerequisite, [!]documents, [!]proof, [!]ownerInfo, [!]context-restrictions

Some entries are enabled by default which are described in the schema section of the response payload. For more information about refinement, see 6W REST Services Principles - Refinement Section.

success.description: The response data when the request succeeds with 200 status code.
Reflects true to indicate successful request.

error-400.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

internalError.description: The technical reason of the failure - usually associated with a 500 error; this is not an NLS message and reflects the MQL or runtime exception.
